zh.lifeSummary: 當Prudence Robinson於1643年12月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特受洗時，她的父親William Robinson28歲，母親Margaret Beach23歲。她於大約1661年與John Bridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1677年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prudence Robinson于1643年12月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特受洗时，她的父亲William Robinson28岁，母亲Margaret Beach23岁。她于大约1661年与John Bridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1677年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Robinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Robin , a pet form of Robert , + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
French: from a pet form of the personal name   Robin  .

West Indian (including Haiti) and Guyanese: most likely not (only) of English or French origin as in 1 above and 2 above, but also, if not mostly, from the related name of the famous Daniel Defoe's literary character Robinson Crusoe (from a novel first published in 1719).

variants.name: Robbinson
meanings: Altered form of English or French   Robinson  .

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Emile, Marcel, Achille, Armand, Arnaud, Camille, Julien, Michel, Normand.
French, Breton, Scottish, English, and German: from the personal name Robin, a pet form of Robert , composed of the short form Rob + the hypocoristic suffix -in.
Slovenian: topographic name derived from rob ‘edge, border’ (see Robar ).

nameMeanings.name: Prudence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval form of the Latin name Prudentia, a feminine form of Prudentius, from prudens ‘provident’. The Blessed Prudentia was a 15th-century abbess who founded a new convent at Como in Italy. Later, among the Puritans in 17th-century England, Prudence was associated with the vocabulary word for the quality.

en.lifeSummary: When Prudence Robinson was christened on 17 December 1643, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, William Robinson, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Beach, was 23. She married John Bridge about 1661, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1677.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prudence Robinson a été baptisée le 17 décembre 1643, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Robinson, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Beach, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Bridge environ 1661, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1677.

Dezember 1643 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America getauft wurde, war ihr Vater William Robinson 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret Beach 23. Sie hat um 1661 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Bridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1677.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prudence Robinson è stato battezzato il 17 dicembre 1643 nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, William Robinson, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret Beach, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato John Bridge circa 1661, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1677.

ja.lifeSummary: Prudence Robinsonが1643年12月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターで洗礼を受けた時，父William Robinsonは28歳，母Margaret Beachは23歳であった。約1661年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでJohn Bridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1677年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Prudence Robinson(이)가 1643년 12월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Robinson(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Beach(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1661년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 John Bridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1677년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prudence Robinson foi batizada em 17 de dezembro de 1643, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Robinson, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Beach, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bridge aproximadamente 1661, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1677.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prudence Robinson была крещена 17 декабря 1643 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени William Robinson было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Beach, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bridge около 1661 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1677 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prudence Robinson se bautizó el 17 de diciembre de 1643, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Robinson, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Beach, tenía 23 años. Se casó con John Bridge aproximadamente 1661, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió después de 1677.
